modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Should I fix accessibility errors in Word?

full_description_text: I am working on a document in Word. I see some accessibility errors. I am not sure if I need to fix them or not.
short_description: Should I fix accessibility errors in Word?
description: I am working on a document in Word. I see some accessibility errors. I am not sure if I need to fix them or not.
